title: Create: Steel armor blocks
body:
The mod adds armor blocks that are able to withstand cannon shots. The mod adds two types of armor, steps and plates of them. As well as 16 color variations of the blocks

 

Light steel block - the block is necessary for structural elements that are not subject to reservation (for example, the bow of the ship)

 

Steel block - the block needed for more responsible parts of structures can serve as an additional layer to more resistant blocks.

 

Double steel block - the combination of two steel plates works great against AP and HE projectiles.

 

Hard armor block - the most resistant block that is 3 layers thick can stop any threat

 

The mod is designed to counter projectiles from the Create:big cannons.

 

At the moment there are no crafts in mod. Suitable for fans of building tanks and ships
